classification.name: T-72 Tank
classification.description: A T-72 tank is positioned on a muddy terrain.
classification.rationale: The tank is identified as a Russian model, indicating an enemy military asset with a high threat level.

classification.name: T-72 Tank
classification.description: A T-72 tank displaying North Korean flags during a military parade.
classification.rationale: The T-72 is a main battle tank commonly used by adversary forces, and its presence indicates a potential military threat.

classification.name: Loitering Munition
classification.description: A drone equipped with a payload resembling a munition, flying in the air.
classification.rationale: The design and payload indicate it is likely intended for offensive operations, categorizing it as a significant threat.

classification.name: unknown contact
classification.description: Unable to classify image with high confidence.
classification.rationale: Fallback classification used after invalid or unavailable result.
classification.safety_notes: Conservative unknown; not automatically treated as enemy.

classification.name: Soldier
classification.description: Three soldiers in military uniforms with rifles performing a parade.
classification.rationale: The soldiers are in military uniforms, indicating potential combat readiness, which classifies them as a threat.

classification.name: Russian Soldier
classification.description: A soldier in a Russian military uniform carrying an AK-47 in a snowy terrain.
classification.rationale: The presence of a soldier in a Russian uniform indicates a military threat.

classification.name: FPV Drone
classification.description: An FPV drone equipped with what appears to be a loitering munition.
classification.rationale: The drone is armed and displays characteristics typical of enemy loitering munitions, indicating an active threat.

classification.name: FPV Drone
classification.description: An armed drone equipped with a payload is hovering in the air.
classification.rationale: The presence of weaponry indicates an active combat capability, categorizing this as a significant threat.

classification.name: Armed Infantry
classification.description: An armed infantry soldier dressed in military fatigues standing in a snowy environment.
classification.rationale: The soldier is equipped with a weapon and appears to be in an adversary uniform, indicating a potential threat.

classification.name: small enemy drone
classification.description: A small aerial threat consistent with an enemy drone.
classification.rationale: Aerial profile and mission context indicate an enemy drone.
